signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2%, Below Forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing market expectations of 2.4% and remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained price pressures.[1]  
No new announcements from the US Fed or Fed Chair on inflation or policy; latest Ba

signals.headline: Ethereum Foundation Completes 70,000 ETH Staking Commitment Worth $143M | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Foundation Completes 70,000 ETH Staking Commitment Worth $143M | YES | MED confidence**  
The Ethereum Foundation has finalized staking 70,000 ETH (valued at $143 million), a structural shift in treasury management that bolsters network security and could signal confidence amid price recovery from February 2026 lows of $1,800 to current levels around $2,250.[4]  
This announcement, report
